SearchDash Add to Chrome — Free
Chrome Extension

Type Once,
Search Everywhere

Instantly switch between Google, YouTube, GitHub, Wikipedia, and more — all from a single search box. Press Ctrl+Shift+K and jump to any engine in one click.

Add to Chrome — Free See Features
Features

Everything you need to search faster

Stop typing the same query into multiple search engines. SearchDash gives you one search box that connects to all your engines.

⚡

Keyboard Shortcut

Press Ctrl+Shift+K (or Cmd+Shift+K on Mac) to open the search panel instantly. No mouse needed.

🔍

10 Built-in Engines

Google, Bing, YouTube, GitHub, Stack Overflow, Wikipedia, Reddit, DuckDuckGo, Amazon, and X — all pre-configured and ready to use.

🔗

Right-Click Search

Select any text on any page, right-click, and search with any engine. No copy-paste, no tab switching.

⚙

Custom Engines

Add your own search engines with custom URL templates. Any site with a search page works.

💾

Sync Across Devices

Your engine list syncs via Chrome. Set up once, use everywhere.

🔒

Privacy First

No tracking, no analytics, no data collection. Your searches stay between you and the search engines.

📄

Multi-Search PRO

Select multiple engines and search them all at once. Compare results across Google, Reddit, YouTube, and more in one click.

How It Works

Three steps to faster searching

1

Install

Add SearchDash from the Chrome Web Store. One click, no sign-up required.

2

Type & Switch

Press Ctrl+Shift+K, type your query, and click any engine icon to search.

3

Go Pro

Unlock unlimited engines, drag-and-drop reorder, and default engine selection for $4.99.

Pricing

Simple, transparent pricing

Free for most users. One-time payment for power users.

Free

$0
forever
  • 5 search engines
  • 10 built-in engines available
  • Keyboard shortcut
  • Right-click search
  • Custom engine URLs
One-Time

Pro

$4.99
one-time purchase
  • Unlimited search engines
  • Multi-Search: search all engines at once
  • Drag-and-drop reorder
  • Set default engine
  • All Free features
  • Lifetime access
